seoTitle: Yerecoin vs Yilkari — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Yerecoin and Yilkari. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Yerecoin and Yilkari.
heading: Yerecoin vs Yilkari — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yerecoin, Western Australia and Yilkari, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yerecoin has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Yilkari (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yerecoin or Yilkari safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yerecoin has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Yilkari scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yerecoin scores 29/100 for bushfire risk. Yilkari scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yerecoin or Yilkari?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yerecoin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
